niche.description: Curated contaminant-anchor roster x CDS GCF_000007645.1 ASM764v1 (NCBI, public domain). 18 loci: the facultative central-metabolism backbone (glycolysis gap/eno/pyk + TCA icd/sdhA/sucC/fumC + ATP synthase + the pdhA/pflB/pta fermentation route) + the surface-adhesin / attachment apparatus (aap, the sdrG/sdrF/sdrH Sdr adhesins, the giant Ebh, the gehC lipase — the host-grip machinery). S. epidermidis ATCC 12228: ~2.5 Mb / ~2,400 CDS; dominant normal skin flora -> the most easily operator-introduced contaminant, #1 indwelling-device biofilm. (ATCC 12228 is the canonical ica-negative reference strain, so attachment anchors on its Aap/Sdr/Ebh apparatus.) The immigration kernel reads role + trait levers, not specific genes (ADR-019 S0, Mode A).
